h39a98eb7gdc99g4c95gb532g10a758066c5c: I love this time of night.
ha6f3244cg8ab1g4030gac96g88c7794aa210: There's an almost reverent silence that accompanies the peak of darkness, when you'd almost believe the dawn will never break.

h5e99d0b2g4393g47a7gb083g433a86c91425: It is the story of a man who fell in love with a goddess.

h0cb33607g3e28g4fc3g9ffcgbee7a9598412: Once upon a time, not quite that long ago, there lived a wizard in a tower.
h1c6f153eg8b78g4385g9d7cg3914d0c2ccae: The wizard was what one might call a prodigy, who from an early age could not only control the Weave, but compose it, much like a musician or a poet.
h6e61095fg1e64g44e5ga6b3g0511d3332e2e: Such was his skill that it earned him the attention of the mother of magic herself. The Lady of Mysteries. Mystra.
h0b0412e2g52fag4e5ag9438g3856d6713ccd: What did Mystra's attention feel like?
h58b70997g8efdg4112g9de2g42b89670bb1f: Perhaps it was not quite love, but you see, the wizard was but a very young man. It was most certainly love to him.
hcafc2178g7572g44d6g9458g63c051a81138: Mystra showed him the secrets beneath the veils. The gossamer veils first, draped across the Weave.
he5213aefg7614g44f4ga407g90c5706cee9d: The delicate veils next, draped across her body. 'Chosen One' she whispered, as she slipped them off completely.
hc8e4fed6g75a4g4c46g8807g534331ae8f11: Are you telling me the wizard made love to a goddess?
h4622c5d6g60fbg4352g943bgfe44fb3054ff: Until one day all too soon, the whispers stopped.
hd8f96743gdd81g4286g9b1eg5772b3224b84: The goddess spurned the mortal. The veils were drawn once more, and the wizard was left behind heartbroken.
hd87593f0gaeffg49acgb1eag0fc1f01abbbe: Poor wizard. Silly wizard too, for he wouldn't take no for an answer.
h293e7750gec8ag4eacga9b5g3e6c12e5f4fc: Like so many of the heartbroken, he did something infinitely foolish.
h74b0f8fbg76d1g49a2gb53bg3f784442ed79: One has to think big if one seeks to win back a goddess. So the wizard thought big.
h624e6f72g697dg427dg8d92g99535bba25c3: Once upon a time, very long ago, a mighty lord lived in a tower. A flying tower to be precise.
h4b50270cg4032g4e3ag86efge98f424469c3: I'll save his story for another time, but the gist of it is that he sought to usurp the goddess of magic so that he could become a god himself.
h2e4217ecg62c3g408fgb443gdc9e9368de34: He almost managed, but not quite, and his entire empire - Netheril - came crashing down around him as he turned to stone.
h8644ad76g4ff6g4e6fg8ddfga7866f29d7e5: The magic unleashed that day was phenomenal, roiling like the prime chaos that outdates creation.
h108b2c96g173cg4241g9faagbc64b9e8d3cf: A fragment of it was caught and sealed away in a book. No ordinary book, mind you: a tome of gateways that contained within it a bubble of Astral Plane.
ha0709e22gd610g4b96ga39ag58f3cde2a154: It was a fragment of primal Weave locked out of time - locked away from Mystra herself.
h1b05a2d5gb08eg4223gb464g354c62f54262: 'What if', the silly wizard thought, 'What if after all this time, I could return this lost part of herself to the goddess?'
h528c8d81gb201g47acg9312gc27568534e7e: What was the answer to his question?
h3aba01b8ga144g42edg8c1ag64db9770c079: The answer was to try, and the outcome was to fail.
h1006c01bgdc47g40c9gbc7bg40a3a3b79157: Here. Place your hand over my heart. Let me show you.

h9c17d404ge07cg4edfgb538g5b24a6e92e6e: *Inside there are no pages, only a swirling mass of blackest Weave that pounces.*

h7506c2bcg527ag4815g856cg020b4c58827b: Yes. Side by side it is.

hf3566faagbf60g4b79g8590gfc4fbbd0a22b: In that case, all we have to do is do better. Shall we?
h92bea746gaf4bg43b0g8be8g7ebbde59dd24: Actually, I'm not sure I still want to.
h740fac22gb10bg4799g9380g4942466e623f: Then you don't have to - though I'd still love to. You really don't?
h418aa414g3f41g4dedg9b34gf8a6b7887fd3: And yet I'm still not in the mood.
h21387db0gb433g4a00g9eadgd000426aedcb: You should tell me to shut up more often.
h4fb17007g3f29g482dg9d16g148da6e7a301: Simplest thing in the world, a kiss. Yet few things are as majestic.
he1aab10bg6aafg4bccga41agddb054569668: I can think of a few things more beautiful.
h3d3d821dg9cc2g4655g98b2gb562a86bf554: Why don't you shut up and kiss me.
he66b9459gfb24g4de7gbedag60d041e54950: I'm sorry, but I actually don't think I can do this. I'm just not in the mood.
h1e54bf5cgefb8g401cg98d5gfc24aca979b0: Not even a simple kiss would change your mind?
h01a277cag04ffg4527g838bgef427cc25b6e: A simple kiss you say. That does sound lovely.
h5139dd65g3f25g4a6ag921eg75b76654a266: I love this time of night as well.
h34412757g85c7g4173g80e2g4ef67ac06028: That sounds rather ominous, does it not?
h3869daa1g302eg403ag9562g7cdf5ba14f6d: I think there's a certain magic in it.
hde462e7dg1b79g4283ga71ag39f7a9ed0dff: A holy time for me, when there's a full moon that is.
h587a8358gdb2eg454bg98e4gfe46fddf92a8: With her soft light, like a film of snow.
h751d86dag82a8g4021ga0eag82af14a86869: Shar's zenith. The most beautiful of times indeed.
hd75aac73g96abg4d7bg8cb6g6c62ae04630d: Like a spell that cannot be unspoken.
hb49eb754gf3b7g4978g849cg03f166294227: I still have a picture to paint you, don't I? I suppose that's why you're here.
h99a97bc4gc670g4955g9f7cgc3a4f56ae223: I take you're here to pick me up on that bedtime story you were promised.
hbd98ff44g43a9g40e0g8f16g2248d9c2511e: Actually, before we move on to the story, there's something I'd like you to consider.
hb94c3366g98feg41d6gb54bgf88dd6290440: You spent the other night with someone else, and I hope it was all you wanted it to be, but...
h826a36c5g0f22g415ega67ag7d7569c5cab9: We shared a romantic moment of the mind while cloaked in the Weave, didn't we?
he083be56g5474g458bg8ec2g187e6b826ae6: And I seem to recall a fond allusion to that moment afterwards.
h0660ac24g5394g4484gb361g9222d3dba7dd: Allow me to make the following proposition:
h3efd6fc7g48beg405aga69dgcb02ccca20c6: There's a book that circulates in Amn, detailing the first thousand nights of a newlywed king and queen.
h70fd7fb0g2240g4a15ga46eg762da8a7712c: They turned everything they did into an art. The art of conversation. The art of taste, time honoured and newly acquired.
hfae789a7g981cg41d4gae7dg043270621e84: The art of the body. The exploration and acceptance of the self and the other. The art of the night itself.
h19713fb7gb4feg44c3gace1g9669633839e4: I say we take a page from their book.
hf441b07fg8216g40d8gbcc0gab99053d9b37: Leave it to you to woo someone with a book.
h14c62108geeb2g4c06gbf84g6c16b7ee3a94: Forget the book then. Let's be blank slates on blank sheets, delightfully new.
h9ce6669dg3721g436dga679g69e58effdef7: That's because I'm full of delights.
h2ad4529ag72c6g4a28gac59g174a07fbc83a: We'll let the night run its course. And when everything is quieting down, safe in the arms of sleep, I'll come by to find safety in yours.
h67d74b5ag73d5g4729g967bg9a746f2a9d7b: I'm afraid I have to decline.
he3532f4eg866bg4284g904egc0fd5ff5cdcb: Too bad. One should never be afraid to live life to the fullest.
hba4cd471geb76g419egab7egdc254d16f464: And yet the night's not quite over. I still have that story to tell.
h93faf01bg8b6bg4c1fga124gfb3f441fb8dd: I'm not sure you're the one I want.
h6c1df391gd524g491cgbe4dgd9d3f693361b: That's because you've yet to find out what you're missing.
h130de15fga853g4bcdg90a7g00db5c21de70: You're right. I'd like to spend the night with you.
h606dbd55g1685g4f84gbac2gb9e1ee785b80: A match made... not quite in heaven, but close enough.
hbc2533c7g1e44g4ee8ga699g0f7918137fef: You're remarkably upfront about your intentions.
h55fe2f75g8ef8g425agaaabgc8830d225375: I'm many things, but coy's not one of them.
hf6c0aadbg85a1g4fa1g931cgfcff02f353b6: I'll remind you we're newly acquainted, not newlyweds.
h02d2263eg780cg407cgae4cgb2fc12ed522f: Then we'll start writing the prequel.
h07304b8fg764fg4271g8703g8c3981552fbf: Let me stop you right there. That's not something I'm interested in.
h5c8afcbcgde57g434dga073g3f0f349e1af5: I'm sorry, but I won't betray Shadowheart.
he5eeadc6g6185g43a2g8da5g3e8b424e7b63: I... I see. She's a lucky woman. Loyalty is such a... such a very rare commodity.
hd8481747gf1d6g4787g9f77gb219af270c24: Apologies, I really did think you and I...
h226d601dg6299g47ccg9d27g461c67f5e184: But no. Perhaps it's for the better. In fact I'll let you be the judge of that.
hd785995ag3c95g4b7ag8913gc3a35080d6c3: After all, I still have a story to tell.
h29a054f3ga89eg4d37g8ffdg416b4b029b0a: I'm sorry, but I won't betray Lae'zel.
h3f30e344g6236g45bbgb333g4a893e1ba4f6: I'm sorry, but I won't betray Karlach.
hc2a8830egaed1g4ee4gb41cge55e37779ff6: I'm sorry, but I won't betray Astarion.
haf0888b5g75b0g4569g8337g2e4f2c9cadab: I... I see. He's a lucky man. Loyalty is such a... such a very rare commodity.
h6b0bfdb2gde36g4121g8e00g23de1269658b: I'm sorry, but I won't betray Wyll.
hb7518459gc219g4837g8d4ag4f07932a6b4b: Perhaps that's a moment we ought to further explore.
ha800c8fdg4b3eg4db2g8b1cg40d947e3397b: We had a moment, you and I, a moment in which we expressed the possibility of becoming more than friends.
hd3f697e8ge1d1g4ad2g806bg96aa0f086406: Tonight seems perfectly suited for such endeavours.
h6ac16abag44a7g4ae6g8e83gbd9b89eec7cc: You'll want to hear this, I assure you.
h90e44363g0b84g4193g9cc6gea57d8d88141: There you are. I suppose you've come to keep me to my promise:
hf4579bbcg0b7fg4a74g8b99g28801abb5297: Yes. It's about time I hear it.
hdce532b4g4173g4408gadd2g60094a3b4dd5: No doubt you've guessed by now there was something rather special about my relationship with the goddess Mystra.
h0ea79a1bg0932g4150g9a6egd16a0a3f03a8: The thing is, we were lovers once.
hf668927dged73g4227g8ec7g33f2081b7b70: Are your hands clean of blood in the meantime?
h603f9cceg5967g4e02g81ddg9401abdaef80: Let's just get this over with.
